rows.label: qev086803_MSG0003
rows.name: What's wrong, Rock? Is it Celica?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086803_MSG0004
rows.name: Yeah. She was talking all crazy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086803_MSG0004_2
rows.name:
Said she was going to join BLADE
and make us both citizens of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086803_MSG0005
rows.name:
She's trying to work for both of
us so I won't have to fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086803_MSG0008
rows.name:
She went to a place called White Woods
to pick selenean sage all by herself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086803_MSG0009
rows.name:
What? That place is swarming with
all kinds of terrible indigens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086803_MSG0012
rows.name: Of course, Rock. She's our friend too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086803_MSG0101
rows.name:
She told me to stay here
and wait for her, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086803_MSG0102
rows.name:
Please go see where Celica
went and what she's up to![ST:wait ]
